creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
Updated "security/scamp" to version "5.2i". This version requires a new configuration file and the removal of obsoleted definition files.

Would it be possible to include the following in the "UPDATING" file:


The changes in the format of files downloaded by this script necessitates
creating new configuration files. USE: "scamp.sh -D" to delete all existing database files downloaded by this script as well as the obsolete configuration files.

Then run: "scamp.sh" to create a new default configuration file. Additional configuration files may be created using the "-C" flag.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
